title: legends288
description: This build is not just a set of mods. It is a digital exhibition dedicated to the era of industrial myth, nuclear technology and protection rituals. Each mod is an artifact
body:
Bork: Nuclear Age 1.7.10 — Digital Museum of Artifacts

Description: This collection is not just a set of mods. It is a digital exhibition dedicated to the era of the industrial world, nuclear technology, and rituals of protection. Each mod is an artifact, each launch is the awakening of a machine. The collection is designed as a museum scene, where each element has its own place, symbolism, and history.## Mods used and attribution

SecurityCraft — Geforce132 (MIT). Official website: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/security-craft
Mod Nuclear Tech by Hbm — HBMTheBobcat (GPLv3). Official website: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hbms-nuclear-tech-mod
Immersive Railroading — cam72cam (MIT). Official website: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-railroading
Track API — cam72cam (MIT). Official website: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/track-api
MrCrayfish vehicle mod — MrCrayfish (LGPL). Official website: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mrcrayfishs-vehicle-mod
Techguns — pWn3d1337 (Custom). Official website: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/techguns
IC2 Classic — Speiger (Custom). Official website: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ic2-classic
Decocraft — ProPercivalalb (custom). Official website: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/decocraft

Translated with DeepL.com (free version)Описание:
Эта сборка — не просто набор модов. Это цифровая экспозиция, посвящённая эпохе индустриального мифа, ядерных технологий и ритуалов защиты. Каждый мод — артефакт, каждый запуск — пробуждение машины. Сборка оформлена как музейная сцена, где каждый элемент имеет своё место, символику и историю.## Используемые моды и атрибуция

- SecurityCraft — Geforce132 (MIT). Официальная страница: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/security-craft  
- Hbm’s Nuclear Tech Mod — HBMTheBobcat (GPLv3). Официальная страница: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hbms-nuclear-tech-mod  
- Immersive Railroading — cam72cam (MIT). Официальная страница: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-railroading  
- Track API — cam72cam (MIT). Официальная страница: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/track-api  
- MrCrayfish’s Vehicle Mod — MrCrayfish (LGPL). Официальная страница: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mrcrayfishs-vehicle-mod  
- Techguns — pWn3d1337 (Custom). Официальная страница: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/techguns  
- IC2 Classic — Speiger (Custom). Официальная страница: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ic2-classic  
- Decocraft — ProPercivalalb (Custom). Официальная страница: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/decocraft  

Ресурспак (по ссылке, не включён в архив):
- Faithful 32x — официальный сайт: https://faithfulpack.net/
